title: Revealing 'Mafia Inc.'? Financial Crisis, Organized Crime, and the Birth of New Enterprises

original_result.source: Table 2, Column 5 (new_std_ln, complete model with all controls + north x year interactions). Conley spatial HAC SEs (200km, 11yr). N=924.

notes: Mafia and enterprise formation after 2007 financial crisis. 84 Italian provinces (excl. Sicily, Campania, Calabria). Treatment = mafia_n3 (top tertile of Transcrime Mafia Index). Single treatment date: 2007 (crisis onset). crisis_mafia_n3_int is pre-computed DiD interaction. Stata uses reg2hdfespatial for Conley SEs — R will use clustered SEs (coefficients identical, SEs differ). year_k_north = north indicator x year dummies (macro-region x year FEs). SA disabled (single cohort). CS-NYT not applicable (single treatment date). | LESSON 7 REFINEMENT (2026-04-19, direct-level ctrls collapse variant): Paper-auditor EXACT (1.14%). TWFE with ctrls=0.0405 matches paper Table 2 Col 5 byte-identical. TWFE no ctrls=0.0381 (-6%). CS-NT no ctrls=0.0464 (+14% vs TWFE). Spec A (CS+18 ctrls): status=OK but ATT=0.000 with SE=NA → Pattern 42 collapse. Comparison with paper 25 (Carrillo-Feres, also 18 ctrls, Spec A clean): the difference is control STRUCTURE, not count. Paper 25 uses pre-treatment × linear trends (baseline × time interactions, well-behaved under doubly-robust propensity) while paper 335 uses direct time-varying level variables (pop_urb, tourism, banking) which induce perfect propensity-score separation in single-cohort designs → Pattern 42. Refines Lesson 7 from triptych (clean/collapse/inflate) into quadrangulum: (a) 25 Carrillo 18 pre-treat×trends CLEAN; (b) 79 Carpenter 53 demographic staggered COLLAPSE; (c) 125 Levine 6 RCS individual INFLATE; (d) 335 Le Moglie 18 direct-level single-cohort COLLAPSE.
